steps.title: Find the total number of items
steps.content: Green items are $20\%$ of the total. Let $T$ be the total number of items: $$0.20T=60$$ $$T=\frac{60}{0.20}=300$$

steps.title: Calculate the number of blue items
steps.content:
Blue items are 35% of the total. So $$0.35 \times 300 = 105$$. This uses the same total of 300 items found from the green-item percentage.
D is correct.
